name: Center For Hope & Healing
description: Offers free and confidential support to survivors of sexual violence and their loved ones, including individual counseling, medical, and legal advocacy.

name: Greater Lowell Pride
description: Greater Lowell is home to a diverse, resilient, and vibrant LGBTQIA+ community, and PRIDE is an opportunity for our community to come together in celebration, visibility, and solidarity.

name: LGBTQ+ Recovery Empowerment Group @ Riverbend
description: The goal of the LGBTQ+ Recovery Empowerment Group is to provide a confidential, supportive community to foster participants' well-being in recovery.

name: LGBTQ2S+ Death Cafe (Online)
description: A Death Cafe is a group-led discussion about death. The goal of these spaces is to encourage and normalize conversations about death. Feelings about death are as diverse as people are.
schedule: Most Death Cafes are held from 7:00-8:30 p.m. (EST)

name: OUTstandingLIFE
description: A safe, diverse, nurturing online community of LGBTQ+ older adults. Similar to a virtual senior center, our social network is a welcoming place that fosters connectedness through free online programming.

name: Pathway to Better Health
description: Offers patient-centered, compassionate care, specializing in gender-affirming hormone therapy, HIV/STI care, and addiction treatment.
